name: WhatsApp Business
mcp_notes: No official or well-known community Model Context Protocol (MCP) server was identified in the provided sources.
access_notes: Developers can access the platform, test numbers, and a sandbox for free through the official Meta Developer portal.
auth_notes: The API uses Bearer token authentication (System User tokens or temporary access tokens) via the Meta Graph API.

evidence.claim: The WhatsApp Business Platform allows developers to get started quickly and test for free with access to test numbers and a sandbox.
The API uses RESTful calls via the Meta Graph API for messaging and account management, authenticated with Bearer tokens.
Search citation: WhatsApp Business API Setup 2026 (Step-by-Step) + Permanent Access Token + n8n Integration
Search citation: Mastering WhatsApp Business API: Complete Guide with Node.js Integration - End-to-End Tutorial

one_liner: The WhatsApp Business Platform is a messaging API that allows businesses to automate, integrate, and send high-quality messages to customers at scale.
api_notes: The WhatsApp Business Platform (Cloud API) is built on the Meta Graph API. It covers extensive functionality including messaging, registration, and business management.
